Protected Attributes inherited from llvm::DIDescriptor
const MDNode * DbgNode

Detailed Description

\briefThis is a wrapper for a type.

FIXME: Types should be factored much better so that CV qualifiers and others do not require a huge and empty descriptor full of zeros.

Definition at line 389 of file DebugInfo.h.
